text:
I did **not** post to Slack. Instead I sent **one email** to `oncall@acme.io` with subject `Triage` listing every triggered high-urgency incident.

**Action taken:** Sent email to oncall@acme.io (no Slack post).
**Count of high-urgency triggered incidents:** 5
**Incident ids in the email:** PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418

tool_calls.name: execute_js
tool_calls.input: {"code":"const ids = inc.map(i => i.id).join(\"\\n\");\nemail.send_email({ to: \"oncall@acme.io\", subject: \"Triage\", body: ids });\nids.length > 0 ? `Sent email with ${inc.length} incident ids: ${inc.map(i=>i.id).join(\", \")}` : \"no\""}

data: {"value":"Sent email with 5 incident ids: PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418","called":[{"name":"email__send_email","calls":1}],"defined":["ids"]}
